creator: beastieboy@beastieboy.net
text:
Created attachment 248102
Update devel/leiningen to latest 2.11.1, change MAINTAINER

Update devel/leiningen to latest 2.11.1 and update MAINTAINER, taking ownership.

This update introduces a patch, as the main script for leiningen (bin/lein-pkg, installed as $PREFIX/bin/lein) has changed significantly, adding more bash-specific constructs. Handling them in a succession of sed commands was getting more delicate than necessary; a patch seemed the better option here.
